ApplicationPackage.Name: AI Apprentice Native Selection
ApplicationPackage.Description: Captures AutoCAD entity and subentity selections for the connected Agent plugin
ApplicationPackage.Author: AI Apprentice

ComponentEntry.AppDescription: Headless-safe Agent-plugin data bridge with no model runtime or API key

ComponentEntry.AppName: AI Apprentice Native Selection Context Menu
ComponentEntry.AppDescription: Desktop AutoCAD right-click handoff for the host Agent
